notes: ITEMS IN THE 'items' ARRAY ARE WHAT GETS RENDERED.
Order does not matter — news-loader.js sorts by timestamp DESC.
Newest items appear first in both the ticker (top 3) and full feed.
Required fields per item: id, type, timestamp, headline, body, team, tweet.
Optional: tag, stat_change.
type values: 'upgrade' | 'downgrade' | 'new_team' | 'result' | 'paddock'
upgrade  = green left bar + ⬆ icon (stat went up)
downgrade= red left bar + ⬇ icon (stat went down)
new_team = gold left bar + 🆕 icon (joining grid)
result   = blue left bar + 🏁 icon (post-race recap)
paddock  = chrome left bar + 📰 icon (editorial / commentary / power rankings)
team object: { ticker, name, color, logo }
- ticker: '$BRETT', '$DOGE', etc.
- name: full team name (e.g. 'BRETT IS BACK')
- color: hex color used for the card accent (matches grid)
- logo: filename in same dir (e.g. 'brett.png'). REQUIRED for the
floating bottom-right meme avatar. If a logo is missing,
the card falls back to a gold ticker badge.
stat_change object (optional, only for upgrade/downgrade):
{ stat: 'ENGINE'|'AERO'|'CHASSIS'|'DRAG'|'PIT', from: number, to: number }
tweet: the exact copy that gets pushed to clipboard / pre-filled in X intent.
Keep under 280 chars. Use \n for line breaks. Add '$TICKER' for crypto refs.
TO ADD A NEW ITEM: append to the 'items' array, save the file. Done.

items.headline: OFFICIAL TEAM 3 - $NEURO JOINS THE GRID
items.body: NeurotiCat Racing locked in as the third official team for Season 2. Driver: NEURO. Livery: cat orange. Starting profile: 3.7 overall - the underdog of the grid, with two clear upgrade paths heading into Race 1. Real on-chain stats. Real partnership. The grid grows.
items.tweet:
OFFICIAL TEAM 3 - $NEURO

the @NeurotiCat community brings the chaos. we bring the chassis.

season 2 grid:
[locked] $TURBO
[locked] $MASK
[locked] $NEURO
[open] x 12

lights out june 1.

$MEMEGP

items.headline: ROUND 1 POWER RANKINGS · WHO'S IN FORM FOR SATOSHI SPEEDWAY
items.body: BRETT enters Round 1 as the consensus favourite after a flawless pre-season testing programme. DOGE's race pace looks ominous, PENGU is the dark horse on fresh upgrades, and SHIB looks vulnerable in the midfield. Full grid analysis inside.
items.tweet:
🏁 ROUND 1 POWER RANKINGS

⭐ Title favourites: $BRETT, $DOGE
🐎 Dark horse: $PENGU
⚠️ At risk: $SHIB

Satoshi Speedway, June 2026. Form guide is up at memegrandprix.com/gp-central.html

#MEMEGP #MemeRacing

items.headline: TURBO REWIRES THE PIT WALL
items.body: Pit Ops rating climbs from 5 → 7 after $TURBO's off-season tooling overhaul. Faster tyre changes, sharper strategy calls. The mid-grid just got a serious threat.
items.tweet:
🏁 PIT UPGRADE

$TURBO Pit Ops: 5 → 7

The @AiTurboRacing crew has been busy in the off-season and the numbers don't lie. Faster stops, sharper calls. Mid-grid just got dangerous.

#MEMEGP $TURBO

items.headline: MOG WOBBLES · CHASSIS RATING SLIDES
items.body: Chassis stiffness drops from 9 → 8 as $MOG liquidity contracts in the run-up to Round 1. Cornering stability takes a hit and the engineers won't be happy. Time to shore up the foundations.
items.tweet:
🏁 CHASSIS DOWNGRADE

$MOG: 9 → 8

Liquidity contraction = corner stability hit. Engineers in the @MogWorks garage have work to do before Round 1.

This is why depth matters, friends. 🛠️

#MEMEGP $MOG

items.headline: BONK FINDS HORSEPOWER · ENGINE 7 → 8
items.body: $BONK breaks through a key market cap threshold and the dyno responds. Engine rating jumps from 7 → 8 just in time for Round 1. Top-end speed is suddenly a Bonk problem for the rest of the grid.
items.tweet:
🏁 ENGINE UPGRADE

$BONK: 7 → 8 ⚡

Market cap breakthrough triggers a dyno win. @bonk_inu suddenly has top-end speed they didn't have a week ago.

Who's catching them down the Satoshi Speedway main straight now?

#MEMEGP $BONK

items.headline: $FLOKI CONFIRMED FOR SEASON 2 GRID
items.body: FLOKI Motorsport has signed paperwork and is officially on the Season 2 grid. Eleven cars confirmed, the field is filling out. Full driver lineup to be announced ahead of Round 1.
items.tweet:
🏁 NEW TEAM ON THE GRID

Welcome @RealFlokiInu to Season 2. 🐺

The field is now 11 strong and the grid is filling out fast. Round 1 at Satoshi Speedway can't come soon enough.

#MEMEGP $FLOKI

items.headline: WHY BRETT'S PRE-SEASON PACE HAS THE PADDOCK WORRIED
items.body: Three test sessions, three fastest laps. BRETT is doing what champions do — turning up early and leaving nothing on the table. Rivals are downplaying the times publicly while their engineers privately recalibrate. This is starting to look like a coronation.
items.tweet:
🏁 PADDOCK NOTEBOOK

Three test sessions. Three fastest laps. $BRETT is doing what champions do.

Rivals are smiling for the cameras. Their engineers are not smiling at the data.

Is Round 1 already over?

#MEMEGP $BRETT

items.headline: SEASON 1 FINALE · BRETT TAKES TITLE IN LAST-CORNER PASS
items.body: The kind of finish you tell your grandchildren about. BRETT down by 0.4s on the final lap, found a sliver of inside line at the last hairpin, and snatched the championship by a tenth. DOGE will replay this corner for years.
items.tweet:
🏁 SEASON 1 FINALE · ARCHIVED

Last lap. Last corner. 0.4s gap.

$BRETT found the inside line and stole the title from $DOGE by a TENTH.

This is why we built Meme GP. Season 2 starts July 1. 🍿

#MEMEGP
